papers.title: Spatial atlas of diabetic kidney disease reveals a B cell-rich subgroup
papers.headline: Scientists find immune cells that mark patients whose diabetic kidney damage worsens quickly.

papers.title: Improving access to essential medicines via decision-aware machine learning
papers.headline: Decision-aware machine learning improves essential medicine allocation in resource-limited settings.
papers.ml_angle: Decision-aware machine learning framework integrating practical constraints and allocation decisions to optimize essential medicine distribution in healthcare systems.

papers.title: Safety and efficacy of intratumoural anti-CTLA4 with intravenous anti-PD1
papers.headline: Intratumoural ipilimumab with IV nivolumab improves safety and efficacy in combined immunotherapy.

papers.title: Multimodal AI integrating pathology, genomics, and clinical data predicts immunotherapy response in non-small cell lung cancer
papers.headline: A multimodal AI model predicts immunotherapy response in lung cancer with 82% accuracy, outperforming PD-L1 expression alone.
papers.ml_angle: Transformer-based multimodal fusion model integrating digital pathology (ViT encoder), transcriptomics, and clinical tabular data via cross-attention.
